title: Refined Storage - ReCreated
description: Makes Refined Storage better fit with Create Mod
body:
This resource pack changes the textures of the Refined Storage mod to fit the style of Create mod. It's perfect for modpacks that include both of these mods. But you could also use it without create mod

All the content remade in a new style:
![Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Qsuykqni/images/5f398492a7ee3b5235e8fd1ce39b1f4424155ddf.png)
![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Qsuykqni/images/a5db94c15340916bb91dd34aac0665ef1937a2d5.png)

All the colorful blocks now have new vibrant color palettes
![Colored controllers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Qsuykqni/images/426077a5d89d9898045e0bc0d3d16d503cb04ca5.png)
